nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dark-backed weaver
nodes.summary: Dark-backed weaver（Ploceus bicolor）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dark-backed weaver。

nodes.name: Dark-backed weaver
nodes.summary: The dark-backed weaver (Ploceus bicolor), also known as the forest weaver, is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is very sparsely present across central and southern Sub-Saharan Africa. References External links Dark-backed weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch. (Dark-backed weaver = ) Forest weaver - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds. image at ADW

nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。
